## Summary

Briefly describe the change and why it is needed.

## Type of change

- [ ] feat: new feature
- [ ] fix: bug fix
- [ ] docs: documentation only
- [ ] test: tests only
- [ ] refactor: code change that neither fixes a bug nor adds a feature
- [ ] perf: performance improvement
- [ ] chore / ci / build: tooling or pipeline

## Checklist

- [ ] Commit messages follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/).
- [ ] Public types and methods have XML documentation.
- [ ] New code follows SOLID and uses DI where appropriate.
- [ ] `dotnet build TcxEditor.sln -c Release` succeeds locally.
- [ ] `dotnet test TcxEditor.sln -c Release` passes locally.
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `## [Unreleased]` if user-visible.

## Linked issues

Fixes #
